note: Committed real-news snapshot for reproducible, offline-by-default runs. Each headline's title, source, and URL are real and were captured on `as_of`; the sentiment score is computed from the titles by verdict.sentiment.score. This keeps the demo honest (real, clickable sources) AND reproducible (no key, no network). To refresh, replace these rows from a live news source.
